title: The Merchant's Lost Wagon
target: recover the salt-merchant's wagon from the brigands camped at the Crow's Ford

contributions.line: Marek's brute strength helps crack the iron lock, but the effort leaves him more worn than usual.
Roselle's keen eye and quick feet slip past the treeline sentry with cautious precision, avoiding detection.

outcomeNarrative: Despite their efforts, the brigands are more alert than expected; Marek's exhaustion and Roselle's caution aren't enough to beat the odds.
